description_long: This object depicts a stylized human figure in a dynamic running pose, representing a jogger in mid-stride. The figure has elongated limbs and a simplified, angular form, with one leg extended forward and the other bent backward, suggesting motion. The arms are positioned with one forward and one back, typical of a running gait, and the head is slightly tilted, facing ahead. The jogger is dressed in a sleeveless top and fitted pants, with visible running shoes that have a distinct, blocky shape. The color palette includes shades of blue, tan, and purple, with the skin tone rendered in a light brown. The overall appearance is low-poly and abstract, emphasizing movement and athleticism.
description: A stylized, low-poly jogger in mid-stride, wearing a sleeveless top, fitted pants, and running shoes, with dynamic limb positioning and a simplified, angular form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jogger's face, forward arm, and extended leg, highlighting the running posture and upper body details.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the bent rear leg, backward arm, and the profile of the head and torso, with clear visibility of the stride.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the trailing leg, with both arms visible in their running positions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the forward leg and arm, with the head turned slightly and the body leaning into the stride.
attribute_clothing_type: Sleeveless fitted top and tight athletic pants, both with a smooth, matte finish and minimal detailing.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes with a thick, blocky sole and a two-tone color scheme, likely synthetic material.
attribute_running_posture: Upright running posture with one leg extended forward and the other bent back, arms in a natural running swing, head facing forward, and body slightly leaning into the stride.
